cover.era_chip: 日帝 强占 · 武斷·文化·末殺
cover.subtitle:
이름만 바뀐 35년,
수탈은 더 깊어졌다.
cover.imagePrompt: Japanese-occupation era illustration, 1910s. ONE Japanese military police officer (헌병경찰) in dark olive uniform with a tall cap, long sword at his side, standing rigidly in front of a closed wooden gate of a Korean government building. Behind him in shadow: a pale silhouette of a Korean man in white hanbok with bowed head, holding a folded paper. The ground: dry packed earth with one fallen crimson leaf. Color: dark olive + ink-black + crimson accent on the leaf + sepia background. Style: flat illustration, hand-drawn lines, simple shading, paper texture background. NO TEXT, NO LETTERS, NO NUMBERS, NO CAPTIONS, NO LOGOS anywhere in image. No realistic photo quality, no anime, no modern anachronism.

timeline.text: 회사령 공포. 한국인 기업 설립을 총독 허가제로.
산미증식계획 시작. 일본으로 쌀 반출 본격화.

outro.tip_headline:
"무단 → 문화 → 말살"
전환 계기를 묶을 것.
outro.tip_body: 심화 시험에서는 무단/문화/민족말살 시기의 핵심 법령(조선태형령·치안유지법·국가총동원법) 매칭, 3·1운동(1919)이 무단→문화 전환의 계기, 만주사변(1931)·중일전쟁(1937)이 민족말살 강화 계기임이 자주 출제.
outro.imagePrompt: Minimal hanji-beige background. CENTER: a stylized small Japanese military cap silhouette overlapping a crumpled folded paper suggesting the 국가총동원법. LEFT: a small chain link silhouette. Cream #F2EDE3 base + dark olive #4A4A2C accent + crimson #B23A3A line. Flat illustration, hand-drawn lines, simple shading, paper texture background. NO TEXT, NO LETTERS, NO NUMBERS, NO CAPTIONS, NO LOGOS anywhere in image. No realistic photo quality, no anime, no modern anachronism.
